title: SOL 100pk Bulk NY 2-in-1 Coffee Sachets, White Coffee, Case Pack Includes 10 x 10 Individually Wrapped Instant Sticks, Convenient and Portable, Perfect for Home, Office, or Travel
features: Premium New York Coffee Brand: Enjoy the prestige and quality associated with the renowned New York Coffee brand, known for its exceptional coffee blends.

All-in-One Convenience: Each 2 in 1 coffee sachets contains coffee and creamer in perfect proportions, eliminating the need for separate ingredients and ensuring a consistently delicious cup every time.
Balanced Sweetness: The inclusion of sugar provides a harmonious level of sweetness that appeals to a wide range of taste preferences..
Quick and Easy Preparation: Save time with instant preparation - simply add hot water for a rich and creamy coffee experience in moments.

Bulk Quantity : This product comes in a bulk package of 100 sachets, you will receive 10x packets each with 10 coffee sachets 3in1, making it ideal for stocking up, businesses, or frequent coffee consumption.

Simply empty the sachet into a cup, add hot water, and stir. You’ll have a smooth, creamy white coffee ready in moments. What’s included in each 2 in 1 sachet? Each sachet contains a perfectly balanced mix of coffee and creamer, providing a rich and creamy taste without the need for additional ingredients. Can I adjust the sweetness of the coffee? The sachets do not contain sugar, allowing you to adjust the sweetness to your preference by adding sugar separately if desired. Is this bulk pack suitable for large gatherings or offices? Yes, the pack includes 100 sachets, divided into 10 packets of 10, making it ideal for offices, events, or frequent home use. How should I store these coffee sachets? Store the sachets in a cool, dry place. Each sachet is individually sealed to maintain freshness, ensuring a delicious cup every time.
